title: lindernia elata
intro: Lindernia elata, also known as false lipenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Lindernia elata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
